I saw you're already pretty deep but imo the easiest way is to just run bulba and smash everything in the first 1/3 of the game. Use a Geodude to beat flying and fire types if you want (notably Gary's bird and lizard). It can easily hold you off until you hit Celadon to get your Eevee. Bokrug Bishop Reya|伯克鲁格尋求者 was playing
Hey guys, I'm really sorry but I'm going to leave.
I genuinely wanted to enjoy the game and connect with fellow fans, but due to technical issues  I am unable to download the assets, and therefore play the game.
Although my stay here was short, I am very grateful for the warm welcome I received. I might return one day, so maybe we'll all meet again. Until then, good luck, and farewell.
